## Title 

Make Secure Payments

## User Story

**As an** customer

**I want** to pay securely online

**So that** my reservation is confirmed safely

## Story Points

8

## Tasks

- [ ] Integrate payment gateway
- [ ] Secure transaction handling
- [ ] Validate payment success

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Payments are processed securely
- [ ] Payment confirmation is received

## Given / When / Then

**Given** the user selects payment,

**when** the transaction is completed,

**then** booking is confirmed.

## Validation and Evidence

**Validation method**
Payment testing

**Related repository evidence**
docs/payment.md
